Phase 02 What is Totonou · Join Our Team
04
Totonou
[toh · toh · noh]
A natural state of mind-body synchronization.
What is Totonou?
In a landscape often defined by high-effort endurance, we champion the Japanese concept of Totonou. Depth without the effort.
#UmiSauna #Totonou #JapaneseWellness #SaunaLife #Restoration #VancouverWellness

The Guide
We are looking for guides who understand the value of restraint. If you believe in providing a safe, designed container, we want to meet you.

Ma
The intentional use of space and silence.
The Space

Phase 03 What is Ocean Plunge
07
Ocean Plunge
Surrender to the elements
The Plunge
Stepping from the intense heat of the cedar room into the embrace of the Pacific Ocean. This is not about pushing your limits.
#UmiSauna #OceanPlunge #ColdTherapy #PacificNorthwest #VancouverWaters #Totonou

Heat
The Cycle
Cold
The Contrast
